definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="String" id="a">a</variable><variable type="Entity" id="entity">entity</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="text_print"><value name="TEXT"><block type="world_data_get_display_name"></block></value><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">world instanceof ServerLevel level</field></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="variables_set_string"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:a</field><value name="VAL"><block type="custom_dependency_string"><field name="NAME">uuid</field></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:entity</field><value name="VAL"><block type="java_code_get"><field name="CODE">level.getEntity(UUID.fromString(a))</field></block></value></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="return_entity"><value name="return"><block type="variables_get_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:entity</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
